ld\":\"BATCH_SIZE = 64\",\"op\":\"replace_exact\",\"source\":\"\",\"text\":\"\"},{\"anchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    total_steps = max(1, total_steps)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Make the learning-rate schedule match the fixed-step budget instead of 100 epochs, then pair it with a larger batch and more aggressive Adam step size for faster early optimization in the short 256-step regime.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\",\"micro\"]}"}}
